_comment: Brotli-transfer budgets for the Flutter Web build, enforced by tool/size_budget.sh.
Each budget's Brotli-compressed size (quality 11) must stay <= maxBrotliKB.
This is the size a correctly-configured server WOULD transfer (Content-Encoding: br),
so it is server-independent and deterministic. Globs are relative to build/web.
Ratchet policy (mirrors the coverage gate in CLAUDE.md): keep a small headroom above
the measured value; when an optimization lands, lower the budget so it cannot silently
regress. Baseline measured 2026-07-22 with Flutter 3.44.6 is in each 'measured' note.
See docs/web-performance.md for how to read and adjust these.

budgets.label: Application JS (main.dart.js)
budgets.note: The 'JS transferred (Brotli)' budget. ~94% is Flutter itself; app code is ~113 KB.

budgets.label: Scripts fetched on first load
budgets.note: Only the JS Chromium actually fetches; the other 5 renderer loaders are never loaded.

budgets.label: Custom fonts (Inter + Fraunces + SourceSerif4)
budgets.note: Shipped in full (not subset). Lower to ~450 once font subsetting lands.

budgets.label: Renderer (CanvasKit, chromium wasm)
budgets.note: The single variant Chromium/Steam Deck fetches. ~1150 KB if you switch to Skwasm (--wasm).

budgets.label: First-load total (what a new visitor downloads)
budgets.note: Excludes NOTICES (license page only) and the 5 unfetched renderer variants.
